about_item: Space-Saving Foldable Design: This collapsible dog crate features a innovative foldable design, allowing it to be stored flat when not in use. Perfect for small apartments or homes with limited space, it ensures easy storage without sacrificing functionality.

Easy Mobility with Wheels & Handles: Equipped with two smooth-rolling wheels and sturdy handles on both sides, this pet crate offers effortless mobility. Ideal for repositioning in your living room, patio, or vehicle.

Durable & Escape-Proof Construction: Made from reinforced hard plastic and strong metal wire, this heavy-duty dog crate ensures maximum security. The robust design prevents escapes and provides a safe, den-like environment for your dog. It’s both functional and aesthetically pleasing for modern homes.

Secure & User-Friendly Lock Mechanism: Features squeeze-latch locks on the door for quick and secure closure. These locks are easy for owners to operate but prevent clever dogs from opening them. Set up and fold down the crate in seconds with no tools required.

Multi-Scenario Use: Designed for versatile use - whether as a cozy indoor dog house, a crate for road trips, or a temporary containment space outdoors. The 27.95"L x 18.9"W x 21.65"H crate fits comfortably in most mid-to-large SUV trunks, making it perfect for adventures and daily use alike.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate to be of excellent quality, with easy setup and takedown taking less than 30 seconds. The crate is sturdy, opens and closes without trouble, and is perfect for car travel. They appreciate its foldability, with one customer noting it collapses to about 4-5 inches thick for storage, and its lightweight design. Customers like the size, with one mentioning it provides plenty of room for movement.

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Crate
authors_reviews.text: OMG! I love this crate! It's so easy to use. It just pops right up and collapses right down. I got this to train my infant Doberman. This crate is very sturdy and seems to be bite proof and escape proof. It might even be good for travelling but I haven't tried that yet. It is exactly as advertised and I would definitely recommend this product.
authors_reviews.author: Dee

authors_reviews.title: Great travel crate
authors_reviews.text: I needed a collapsible crate to keep in my SUV to use when my Shih Tzu travels with me. This crate is fantastic. It folds practically flat and is easy to setup/takedown. My dog is a bigger Shih Tzu weighing about 22 pounds and there is plenty of room for him to move around even with a small water bowl inside. Being made of heavy duty plastic with metal bars it will withstand my dog scratching at the sides. The crate has handles on the top at both ends and wheels on one end of the bottom for easy transport. I think it will last longer than any soft sided crate I have previously owned.
authors_reviews.author: Julie

authors_reviews.title: Purrfect!
authors_reviews.text: Easy set up! My cat was wary at first but then fell in love with it. Great way to bring an indoor cat outside (with some supervision of course). Allows me to get some work done while he gets some fresh air and sun (I put the crate on a table). It goes into place easily and is a cinch to collapse (just watch your arms if you're working alone). The small one is do-able by yourself so long as you're careful. The beige color matches my outdoor furniture very well. Love it!
authors_reviews.author: DM

authors_reviews.title: Bent rod
authors_reviews.text: Nice crate but one of the metal rods was sticking outside the delivery box. Was quite bent. I have attempted to straighten it out but was not very successful. Crate is still functional but I still cannot rethread the rod back into place.
authors_reviews.author: Sioux

authors_reviews.title: So Easy to Set Up, and My Puppy Loves It!
authors_reviews.text: I am absolutely thrilled with this foldable dog crate. I got the 36" model for my new puppy, who is expected to grow to be 40-50 pounds, and he has loved it from the very first day. It's become his safe space and his favorite little den.The best feature, by far, is how incredibly easy it is to set up. The "no tools required" description is completely accurate. I had it out of the box and ready for my pup in literally a minute or two. It just unfolds and clicks securely into place. It's a huge relief compared to other complicated crates I've dealt with in the past. It feels sturdy and well-made, and the cage provides plenty of ventilation and visibility for him.The size is perfect, giving him enough room to stand up and turn around comfortably without being so large that it defeats the purpose of crate training. The wheels are also a nice touch, making it easy to move around the house for cleaning without having to drag it across the floor.My main reason for choosing this model was its portability, as it folds down just as quickly as it sets up. I am planning on traveling with it in a few weeks, and I'm feeling very confident about how easy it will be to pack and use on the go. I will be sure to update this review with my experience after the trip!For now, I can say I have zero complaints. If you're looking for a user-friendly, sturdy, and comfortable crate for your dog, especially for both home use and travel, I highly recommend this one. It's been a fantastic purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Kylie Maria

authors_reviews.title: Easy to assemble and move around. Much better appearance than a black wire kennel.
authors_reviews.text: I like this kennel. It has wheels so I can move it easily around the house. It was easy to assemble and is sturdy. It folds up to about 4 or 5 inches thick for easy storage or to put in your vehicle. I haven't tried to fold it back up so I cannot comment on that. My dog likes it. Our dog is comfortable in it. We got a larger size so he has plenty of room to easily stretch out, stand, up and turn around. It should be easy to clean.
authors_reviews.author: M.L.O.

authors_reviews.title: Better than expected.
authors_reviews.text: Wow! Out of the box, this was so simple to set up and take down. I took it down to make sure the latches worked, and they do. It is lightweight, and being on rollers is a big plus for moving it around the house. I had a wire kennel, and there is no comparison to how easy this is to assemble. I'm getting a puppy, and it will be the perfect size as he grows. I ordered the 28" one as my dog is expected to be 25 pounds. I will give an update in the next few months.Update. I continue to love this product. However, I wish I had ordered the larger one. I have a small golden doodle. He’s 15 pounds at 4 months. I feel he has already outgrown it in height and length. I will use it for probably, and hopefully one more month and then I can move him into a larger space.
authors_reviews.author: Patty B.

authors_reviews.title: Versatile crate
authors_reviews.text: Super easy to set up and light weight, while being more secure than typical travel crates. I use it both in the car to transport my puppy and at home and it's fairly easy to move back and forth. Plus it looks better than an ordinary wire crate.
authors_reviews.author: Mary Mackenzie

other_countries_reviews.title: Jaula de buen tamaño y resistente
other_countries_reviews.text: La jaula es muy fácil de armar, ideal para viajar con los perros seguros, muy buen material y hasta ahorita ha funcionado muy bien.
other_countries_reviews.author: Karla Carrillo
